title: I Denounce You Satan
lyrics: Yeah
We the remnant
Chosen for this hour
It's war time
I plead the blood right now
Every spirit not like God, you gotta go
Yeah
Ha, yeah
Yeah, uh
Hey-yeah
Yeah, yeah
Ha, ha, ha, I denounce you in the name of Jesus
Every devil gotta flee, you don't have no reason (woo)
I'm bold as a lion, I don't fear no evil
Blood of Jesus on me, I'm covered, I'm lethal
Yeah, came out the final, I walk with authority
Devil been lying, but the truth has restored me, yeah
I got the Word and it's cutting like swords to me
Stepping in the Spirit, ain't nothing controlling me, ah
I was in bondage, I'm breaking the chains
Speaking His name and they running in pain
You can't reside where the Holy Ghost reign
I got the power, I ain't playin' no games
When I speak, heaven moves
When I pray, demons lose
Every stronghold breaking loose
By His blood, I'm living proof
I didn't know fear, I didn't know stop
Everything not like God, I cast it out
I denounce sickness, I denounce pain
By stripes, I'm healed again
Generational curses breaking right now
Every altar falling to the ground
Every spirit in my bloodline, move
You got no right, I'm a living proof
Hey!
Flee now
In Jesus' name, in Jesus' name
No authority, the blood (the blood)
The blood
I don't fight , heaven backing me up
Angels on assignment every time I speak up
No weapon formed, it will never prosper
I'm cov–, I'm covered by the blood
Yeah, I'm walking proper
Yeah, yeah, you've been trespassing
Time is up now, eviction notice, you can't stay now
Kingdom, authority when I open my mouth
Every demon gotta bow right now
The righteous bold, yeah, I roar like a lion
Word in my mouth, every devil complying
Light in me, ain't no darkness surviving
Holy Ghost fire, the Spirit alive
And I plead the blood over me and my house
Every curse broken, I'm free right now
Every chain shatter when I call His name
Jesus got the victory, forever He reigns
I denounce you (I denounce you)
Every spirit (every spirit), every lie (every lie)
The righteous (the righteous) are bold as a lion, I roar
No weapon (no weapon) formed against me shall prosper
I stand on the Word
Jesus is King
Devil defeated
That's final
That's final
That's final
That's final (final)
